assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response upgrades the control plane last (Phase 4) after upgrading all node pools, which is incorrect

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear order: coordinating→master→data with rationale that coordinating nodes are stateless and safest first

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions that 'regional pd-ssd volumes will automatically reattach to new nodes' at the end

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: No mention of PodDisruptionBudgets (PDB) for master nodes to ensure quorum protection

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Only specifies maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for master nodes, and maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 for data nodes, not for all node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes health checks and monitoring commands between upgrade phases, including checking for green status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: No mention of checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: No kubectl rollout status commands provided for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes specific curl commands to create Elasticsearch snapshots in the pre-upgrade preparation section
